# Claude workflow smoke test

This file exists solely to trigger `.github/workflows/claude.yml` on a test PR on
`kovtcharov/gaia`. It is NOT intended to be merged upstream.

Purpose: validate the v1.0.99 migration in PR #797 against `amd/gaia`. See that
PR's description for the full test plan.

If you're reading this on `amd/gaia:main`, something went wrong — this file
should have been dropped before merging. Feel free to delete.
